code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Assume all triples refer to the same primary subject
    subject = triples[0].subject
    parts: list[str] = []

    # Mapping from predicate to a short phrase generator
    phrase_map = {
        "category": lambda o: f"is a {o}",
        "country": lambda o: f"is located in {o}",
        "location": lambda o: f"is located at {o}",
        "municipality": lambda o: f"in {o}",
        "state": lambda o: f"in {o}",
        "district": lambda o: f"within the district of {o}",
        "established": lambda o: f"was established on {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda o: f"was founded on {o}",
        "owner": lambda o: f"is owned by {o}",
        "owningOrganisation": lambda o: f"is owned by {o}",
        "inaugurationDate": lambda o: f"was inaugurated on {o}",
        "capital": lambda o: f"has capital {o}",
        "legislature": lambda o: f"has legislature {o}",
        "dedicatedTo": lambda o: f"is dedicated to {o}",
        "designer": lambda o: f"was designed by {o}",
        "material": lambda o: f"is made of {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda o: f"has ethnic group {o}",
        "language": lambda o: f"speaks {o}",
        "religion": lambda o: f"has religion {o}",
        "nearestCity": lambda o: f"nearest city is {o}",
        "currency": lambda o: f"uses currency {o}",
        "largestCity": lambda o: f"largest city is {o}",
        "leader": lambda o: f"leader is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"leader's title is {o}",
        "hasToItsNorth": lambda o: f"is north of {o}",
        "hasToItsSouthwest": lambda o: f"is southwest of {o}",
        "hasToItsWest": lambda o: f"is west of {o}",
        "hasToItsSoutheast": lambda o: f"is southeast of {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda o: f"native name is \"{o}\"",
    }

    for triple in triples:
        generator = phrase_map.get(triple.predicate)
        if generator:
            parts.append(generator(triple.object))

    if parts:
        sentence = f"{subject} " + ", ".join(parts) + "."
    else:
        sentence = f"{subject}."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
